name: Gourmet Beef Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ground beef with salt, pepper, and ice water until combined.
2. Shape the mixture into 8 equal patties.
3. Place a slice of cheese and ham on 4 of the patties.
4. Cover the remaining patties and press to seal in the ham and cheese.
5. Broil for 4 minutes on each side or to your desired level of doneness.
6. Makes 4 servings.
Tip: The ice water helps prevent the meat from drying out.
